---
title: Curriculum Vitae
format:
  quarto-cv-pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    page-layout: article
  html:
    page-layout: article
author: Nguyen Huu Kien
phone: (+84) 559 261 197
address: "Lung Giang Ward · Lim Town · Tien Du District · Bac Ninh Province · Vietnam"
email: kien.ngynh@gmail.com
github: kienngynh
web: linkedin.com/in/kienbk60
fontawesome: yes
nocite: '@*'
validate-yaml: false
csl: apa-cv.csl
---

![](assets/avatar.png){fig-align="center" width="15%"}

# Profile

Senior Test Software Development Engineer with 7+ years of experience architecting hardware-software test systems for network device manufacturing at scale. At CyberTAN (Foxconn), spearheaded the design of multi-domain automated test platforms — RF, functional, and yield monitoring — enabling high-volume NPI cycles. Proven ability to bridge embedded systems, cloud tooling (GCP, Docker), and scripting (Python, Rust, Go) to deliver reliable, maintainable engineering infrastructure.

# Skills

## Core Competencies

Test Automation Architecture · NPI Test Engineering · Embedded Firmware Development · CI/CD for Hardware · Manufacturing Yield Optimization · Industrial Automation (PLC) · AI/ML Integration · Hardware-Software Integration Testing · Cross-functional Technical Collaboration

## Programming Languages

* **Proficient:** Python, C++
* **Experienced:** Rust, Go, PowerShell, Shell, Batchfile
* **Familiar:** C#, Lua, Nix, PLC languages (Structured Text, Function Block Diagram)


## Platforms & Tools

* **OS:** Linux, Windows
* **Cloud & DevOps:** GCP, Docker, GitHub Actions, Fly.io, Synology
* **Data & Docs:** SQLite, Jupyter Notebook, Quarto, Markdown, Mermaid Chart
* **Design & Simulation:** FreeCAD, KiCad, OpenFOAM
* **System Config:** Nix (NixOS)

## Soft Skills

* Effective communication and collaboration in multicultural engineering environments.
* Self-motivated learner who rapidly adapts to new technologies and workflows.
* Systematic problem-solving and analytical thinking across hardware and software domains.

## Languages

* **English:** Professional working proficiency; comfortable with technical documentation and written correspondence.
* **Chinese:** Basic conversational ability for work-related communication.

# Experience

**Test Software Development Engineer**
[CyberTAN - Foxconn Technology]
[Bac Ninh, Vietnam]
[08/2024–Present]

* Spearheaded end-to-end firmware validation workflows for multiple product lines — from requirements analysis and test plan design through prototype test development and full NPI execution oversight.
* Architected a multi-domain automated test platform from the ground up, integrating RF calibration, functional validation, and network device testing to significantly compress manual testing cycles.
* Engineered a real-time production yield monitoring dashboard aggregating data across multiple production lines, enabling data-driven rework decisions and improving first-pass yield (FPY) visibility.
* Automated MAC address provisioning across production lines via a custom-built system, eliminating 100% of manual entry errors and reclaiming significant operator time daily.

**Application Software Manager**
[ITC Technology JSC]
[Bac Ninh, Vietnam]
[08/2019 – 08/2024]

* Led full-stack migration of the company website to a high-performance Rust-based platform, reducing page load time and significantly cutting long-term maintenance overhead.
* Developed and optimized embedded firmware for industrial controllers and HVAC systems, achieving measurable improvements in operational efficiency and system reliability.
* Championed the design and delivery of internal workflow tools adopted company-wide, streamlining operational processes across multiple departments.
* Developed firmware and software for next-generation fire alarm systems and integrated Building Management Systems (BMS), delivering improved reliability and system interoperability.
* Streamlined production workflows through custom automation pipelines (Python, PowerShell), reducing manual intervention and improving end-to-end process traceability.

# Key Projects

**Automated NPI Test Platform — CyberTAN, Foxconn**
*[Placeholder — describe the architecture, scope (number of product lines/DUT), key technical decisions, and measurable outcome.]*

**Production Yield Monitoring System — CyberTAN, Foxconn**
*[Placeholder — describe how the system was built, data sources integrated, and impact on production decision-making.]*

**Company Website Migration to Rust — ITC Technology JSC**
*[Placeholder — describe migration scope, technical challenges solved, and measured performance improvements post-launch.]*

# Education

B.Eng. in Electronics and Telecommunications
[*School of Electronics and Telecommunications (SET), Hanoi University of Science and Technology (HUST)*]
[Hanoi, Vietnam]
[08/2015 – 08/2020]

# Interests

* Participating in team-based computer games
* Exploring new places through travel, walking, and hiking
* Designing and building DIY gadgets

# Certifications

* *[Certification Name]* — [Issuing Organization], [Year]
* *[Certification Name]* — [Issuing Organization], [Year]

# Open Source & Community

* **[github.com/kienngynh](https://github.com/kienngynh)** — *[Add description of notable public repositories or contributions here.]*
* *[Placeholder — add blog posts, technical talks, or open-source project descriptions.]*
